positive: A vibrant, whimsical scene depicting a constellation of stylized forest animals—a glowing fox, a gentle deer, a soaring owl, and a mischievous raccoon—intertwined with celestial floral elements and bioluminescent flora. The animals are rendered in clean, thick silhouette style with vibrant, jewel-toned internal glows (deep sapphire, emerald, amethyst). The composition is centered and radial, suggesting a natural, magical nexus. Background features include stylized crescent moons, star clusters, and abstract planetary rings, all rendered flatly and graphically. Style: Modern illustrative vector art, inspired by mid-century natural history sketches combined with stained-glass vibrancy. Lighting: High contrast, deep nocturnal blues and purples contrasted with neon-bright, clean primary and secondary colors. Composition: Symmetrical, centered, and perfect for apparel printing. Clean lines, graphic quality, perfect symmetry.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, logos, signatures, bad anatomy, deformed, noisy, low detail, messy lines, grayscale, photorealism, 3D rendering, depth of field, human, hands
